_instructions: Add your work experience here. Copy the experience object for each job.

experiences.title: Data Analyst
experiences.description: Analyzed 200+ loan applications weekly using SQL, Python (Pandas, NumPy), and Excel, achieving a 98% data accuracy rate and cutting turnaround time by 20% through streamlined data workflows. Deployed machine learning models (Logistic Regression, Decision Trees) for loan discrepancy detection, increasing approval efficiency by 15% and strengthening risk assessment capabilities. Designed and maintained 5+ interactive Power BI and Tableau dashboards to visualize underwriting trends and KPIs, enabling data-driven decision-making for 10+ senior stakeholders across 3 departments. Performed data wrangling, exploratory data analysis (EDA), and statistical modeling across 12+ risk segments to identify patterns in loan performance data, improving underwriting accuracy by 10%.

experiences.title: Technical Support Specialist
experiences.description: Managed and analyzed 500+ user setup datasets for KDOL agents using SQL and Python, reducing onboarding time by 25% through streamlined data pipelines and automated configuration workflows. Authored Python and SQL automation scripts for system configuration management, reducing manual effort by 30% and improving team operational efficiency. Led database optimization initiatives, cutting query response time by 40% for internal reporting tools through advanced SQL query tuning and indexing strategies. Collaborated cross-functionally with 4+ technical and business teams across 2 states to align data infrastructure with enterprise reporting requirements, supporting 1,000+ end users.
